strengths: Clean separation: derivation helpers in agentStream.ts, component focuses on rendering only
Live-else-DB selection via pickContent mirrors the established pickToolTraceForColumn pattern exactly
Auto-follow implemented correctly: scrollRef tracks element, autoFollowRef toggles at SCROLL_THRESHOLD, handleScroll updates on user interaction
deriveColumnFailure handles the failed state independently from the output/thinking derivation
Badge corrected to always show ON — stale reasoning check completely removed
DB fetch guarded by hasLiveContent — no unnecessary network call when live data present
BoardId-scoped derivation prevents cross-board slug collision (EC3 compliance)

issues.description: No test coverage for auto-follow pause behavior (scroll up → autoFollowRef false → scroll-down resumes). Acceptable since jsdom does not support real scrolling, but worth noting.
